outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump departs for Beijing warning Iran of 'decimation' as Kuwait arrests IRGC infiltrators
outlets.summary: Trump left for Beijing state visit saying 'we'll win it peacefully or otherwise.' CNN sources say he is now more seriously considering resuming combat operations. Kuwait confirmed IRGC infiltration attempt at Bubiyan Island.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth faces bipartisan scrutiny in Congress over mounting Iran war costs
outlets.summary: Defense Secretary Hegseth faced back-to-back hearings with bipartisan questioning on $29B war costs and lack of defined exit strategy.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Trump wants to suspend the federal gas tax as prices soar amid war with Iran
outlets.summary: Trump announced intent to suspend gas tax as national average hits $4.52/gallon, up 48% from pre-war.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump heads to China, warns Iran they'll be 'decimated' as China defies new Iran sanctions
outlets.summary: Trump departed for Beijing warning Iran of decimation. China simultaneously ordered its firms to defy new US sanctions targeting Iranian oil buyers — directly daring Washington ahead of the Trump-Xi summit.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump: Iran Ceasefire 'on Life Support' After 'Garbage' Reply — Weighs Renewed Operations
outlets.summary: Breitbart covers Trump's blunt rejection of Iran's proposal and emergency security meeting on resumed combat.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Israeli military kills six in Lebanon as Kuwait says it foiled IRGC infiltration operation
outlets.summary: Israeli airstrike killed 6 in Kfar Dounin. Kuwait confirmed arrest of 4 IRGC naval officers who attempted to infiltrate Bubiyan Island. Lebanon death toll reaches 2,882.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Former Qatar PM: Netanyahu using Iran war to reshape Middle East
outlets.summary: Former Qatar PM Sheikh Hamad accused Netanyahu of using war to advance 'Greater Israel' vision.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Iran threatens weapons-grade uranium enrichment as peace talks falter
outlets.summary: Iran MP warns of 90% enrichment if attacked again. Iran holds 440.9 kg at 60% — enough for ~10 weapons.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF discloses weeklong Golani Brigade raid north of Litani; Houthi drone intercepted near Eilat
outlets.summary: IDF revealed Golani Brigade completed weeklong cross-Litani raid killing dozens of Hezbollah fighters. Separately, IDF intercepted Houthi drone near Eilat — first since ceasefires.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: UK, France to host defense ministers meeting on Hormuz amid Iran threats
outlets.summary: 40-nation defense ministers meeting set for May 13 to discuss multinational Hormuz mission.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu says war 'not over' until Iran uranium removed — CBS 60 Minutes
outlets.summary: Netanyahu declared war not over, demanded physical removal of enriched uranium from Iran.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian vows talks with US 'not surrender' but defense of national interests
outlets.summary: Pezeshkian stated negotiations are not surrender but defense of Iranian national interests.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: EU widens sanctions against Hormuz obstruction; Netanyahu's three conditions for war to end
outlets.summary: EU FAC agreed to widen sanctions targeting Hormuz obstruction and strengthen ASPIDES. Netanyahu on 60 Minutes: uranium must be taken out, enrichment dismantled, proxies ended — three conditions beyond US-Iran framework.
